title: Fav and reuse prompt icons overlapping on preview cards
description: The favourite and reuse buttons on gallery group cards drift closer together and overlap as the UI scales up (Electron webFrame zoom) and in preview state. Root cause: the two buttons were separate absolutely-positioned wraps with hardcoded rem offsets smaller than the (label-bearing) button height, so the gap went sub-pixel/negative. Fixed by wrapping both in a single `__top-actions` flex column (gap-based), so they self-size and never overlap at any button height, label state, or zoom. Fixed in 0.0.4.
